Name: Florbetapir NeuroMark Independent Component Analysis Template (MNI305 Space, 2 mm)

GeneratedBy.Name: GIFT
GeneratedBy.Description: The GIFT software implements multiple algorithms for independent component analysis and blind source separation of group imaging data. GIFT may be found at https://github.com/trendscenter/gift

Description: Template consisting of 17 amyloid-beta networks and 2 cerebellar independent component networks, according with publication titled Building Multivariate Molecular Imaging Brain Atlases Using the NeuroMark PET Independent Component Analysis Framework. Authors for publication are the same as in the Authors tag in this json file. ICA processing used model order 40 and 296 florbetapir subjects (mean=76.1 years, SD=8.0 years). All subjects were cognitively normal and obtained from the Alzheimer's Disease Neuroimaging Initiative (ADNI).
Funding: National Institutes of Health (NIH), Grant U01AG024904
U.S. Department of Defense, Grant W81XWH-12-2-0012
National Institutes of Health (NIH), Grant RF1AG063153
National Institute on Aging (NIA), Intramural Research Program Grant
HowToAcknowledge: Please acknowledge this dataset by citing the publication: Eierud C, et al. 'Building Multivariate Molecular Imaging Brain Atlases Using the NeuroMark PET Independent Component Analysis Framework.' Aperture Neuro, 2025. doi:10.52294/001c.142578
DerivedFrom: 18F-florbetapir PET images acquired as four 5-minute frames per subject, SUVR-normalized using the whole cerebellum as the reference region.
